summary: Frontend-only testing of unified messaging sync between TraderTradePage/BuyerTradePage and MyMessagesPage. All 10 test cases passed: login as trader, navigate to /trader/sales, click 'Открыть' button, verify trade detail page with chat, verify role legend, verify dispute status with red border, verify 'Удаление сообщений запрещено' message, navigate to /trader/messages P2P category, verify trade chats sync, click P2P chat and verify messages load.
critical_code_review_comments: TraderTradePage.js correctly uses unified messaging API (/msg/trade/{tradeId}/init, /msg/conversations/{convId})
BuyerTradePage.js correctly uses unified messaging API
Role colors implemented per specification: User=White, Merchant=Orange #F97316, Moderator=Yellow #F59E0B, Admin=Red #EF4444
Dispute status correctly shows red border around chat area and 'Удаление сообщений запрещено' message
Trade chats appear in both TraderTradePage and MyMessagesPage P2P category (sync working)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified messaging sync between trade pages and MyMessages verified. TraderTradePage at /trader/sales/{tradeId} and MyMessagesPage at /trader/messages both use the same unified messaging API. P2P category in MyMessages shows all trade conversations. Dispute chats show red border, 'Удаление сообщений запрещено' message, and moderator joined notification.

1_login_as_trader.details: Login with trader/000000 at /auth page successful, redirected to /trader

2_navigate_to_sales.details: Navigation to /trader/sales works, page shows 'Мои продажи' header with 8 trades

4_trade_detail_with_chat.details: Trade detail page loads with 'Чат сделки' section, message input (data-testid='trade-message-input'), send button (data-testid='trade-send-message-btn')

5_role_legend_shown.details: Role legend at bottom of chat shows: Пользователь (white), Мерчант (orange), Модератор (yellow), Админ (red)

6_dispute_red_border.details: Disputed trades show red border around chat area (border-[#EF4444]/30), 'СПОР' badge visible

7_delete_forbidden_message.details: 'Удаление сообщений запрещено' message shown in header and chat area for disputed trades

8_navigate_to_messages_p2p.details: Navigation to /trader/messages works, P2P category tab (data-testid='category-p2p') clickable, shows 5 P2P conversations

9_sync_verification.details: Same trade chats appear in both /trader/sales and /trader/messages P2P category. Trade IDs match (e.g., trd_7120, trd_93e3, trd_8d37)

10_p2p_chat_messages_load.details: Clicking P2P trade chat in MyMessages loads messages correctly. System messages ('Сделка создана'), dispute messages, and moderator joined notifications visible

unified_messaging_api_verification.notes: TraderTradePage and BuyerTradePage now use unified messaging API instead of old trade_messages API
